title: Surf Mentorship — Beginner Clinics
summary: Learn to surf in a safe, supportive environment with experienced mentors.
description: Weekly beginner surf clinics covering ocean safety, paddling, pop-ups, and wave selection. Wetsuits and boards provided. All ages welcome.
seasonal_notes: Winter swell season (May-Aug) is optimal. Summer sessions may run at different beaches with smaller swell.

title: Surf Leadership Programme
summary: Advanced surf training combined with leadership and mentorship skills.
description: For experienced surfers who want to become assistant mentors. Includes advanced coaching, ocean safety certification, and mentoring techniques.
seasonal_notes: Requires surf proficiency assessment before joining.

title: Community Gardens Volunteering
summary: Hands-on volunteering in Wave Point's community food gardens.
description: Join the gardening team — planting, maintenance, harvesting, and composting. Produce goes to local feeding schemes. No experience needed.

title: Youth Sports Afternoons
summary: Organised sports and outdoor activities for local youth.
description: Weekly rotating sports: soccer, volleyball, touch rugby, and beach games. Equipment provided. Focus on teamwork and fitness.
seasonal_notes: Summer sessions may shift to earlier/later times due to heat.
